_comment: Hand-verified moto specs for models absent from zigwheels + motomalaysia (mostly newer Chinese/Taiwanese brands with JS-rendered or offline OEM sites). Each row is transcribed from the cited source_url and loaded into motobike_specs.db model_specs with source='manual' by src/load_manual_moto_specs.py. 'model' is the slug chosen so norm(listing model) hits enrich at exact/prefix. Only fields confirmed on the source are filled; ambiguous ones (e.g. unlabelled power units) are left null rather than guessed. power_hp is in HP (convert kW x 1.34102 before entering).
